evidence: Great movie, love horror without gore (love both, actually; especially torture porn).
If you liked DARK SHADOWS (the original series), Se7en, The Twilight Zone (Rod Serling), SIX FEET UNDER, and some noted classic 60s/70s horror movies...
It's a movie which would command their attention.
If you want to see a brilliantly filmed adult fairy tale, it's 'ink' - and it has NOTHING to do with tattoos.
I could go on and on and on, but here's the scoop: if you liked DARK SHADOWS...
It's about the house, and the characters and the storyline.
The remakes of the Cole Porter songs by contemporary artists is beyond a stroke of genius.
I saw this in the theatre with a friend who didn't want to see it at all.
I could always pass it on to a friend if I REALLY hated it.
What a brilliant, sick film for those of us so inclined.
It's achingly beautiful along the way with a touch of science fiction.
I found myself wondering if I even had a soul after the movie ended.
If you REALLY want to surprise yourself, don't look at any of the trailers, and don't read about the storyline.

summary: The user has a strong preference for horror and sci-fi genres, particularly enjoying complex narratives and high production quality. They appreciate emotional depth in films and prefer slower pacing that allows for character development and storytelling.
